summary: M.S. in Artificial Intelligence from Illinois Institute of Technology (graduating May 2026) with hands-on experience building data pipelines, ML systems, and containerized infrastructure in production. Developed a YOLO-based computer vision pipeline containerized with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for scalable inference, built data augmentation pipelines that scaled training datasets from hundreds to 10,000+ samples, and shipped a production RAG system with semantic search using vector embeddings and Pinecone. Comfortable working across data infrastructure, model deployment, and cloud systems in fast-moving engineering environments.

skills.languages: Python, C++ (familiar), TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Go, Java (familiar)
skills.ml: Computer Vision, Object Detection, YOLO, PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Machine Learning, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search, NLP, LLMs, HuggingFace Transformers
skills.infra: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), AWS, GCP, Distributed Systems, Data Pipelines, PostgreSQL, Pinecone, FastAPI, RESTful APIs, Supabase, Railway, Git
